original_image_tags: Black-and-white infrared (IR) sensor still, likely from an aircraft or targeting pod. A central crosshair reticle with numbered tick marks (5, 10, 15) on both horizontal and vertical axes is visible. A small, dark, disc-shaped or oval object is located in the upper central portion of the frame, just above the vertical reticle line and slightly left of center. The background is a uniform gray (likely sky or haze). Several large, black rectangular blocks obscure data in the corners and along the edges of the image. A timestamp is overlaid in white text at the bottom left.

elements.description: A grainy, black-and-white thermal or night-vision photograph showing a crosshair reticle with horizontal and vertical axes. The horizontal axis has numerical markings '15', '10', '5', '5', '10', '15'. A small, dark, blurry object is visible just above the center of the reticle. A small dark speck is visible below and to the right of the center. The image contains several large, solid black rectangular redaction blocks. At the bottom left, the text '12/31/99 18:10:00' is overlaid.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the main visual content (grainy IR/thermal photo with crosshair reticle, dark object above center, black redaction blocks, timestamp at bottom left), but Description B adds specific quoted timestamp text not mentioned in Description A, and Description A notes a disc-shaped object while B calls it 'blurry object' and adds an extra speck, yet these are detail differences rather than clear contradictions on verbatim text.
